pageContext.name: Snoopy (Newsprint Grayscale)
pageContext.description: Sideshow and Super7 are Proud to present the Snoopy (Newsprint Greyscale) Vinyl Collectible!  If you grew up on Peanuts, here is the puppy you've always dreamed of! This poseable 12 tall Supersize Snoopy is made of premium vinyl and features soft felted ears and a real collar with metal tag. This grayscale newsprint variant is an homage to Charles Schulz's original 1950s comic strips! The Supersize Snoopy will arrive packaged in a pet carrier and includes an adoption certificate, straight from Daisy Hill Puppy Farm!
